sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Key objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 25 and n['color'] not in ('B', 'g'):
        center_row = sum(b[0] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_col = sum(b[1] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} ~({center_row},{center_col}) children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
